subject: [PATCH v3 02/16] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch renames the uffd-wp PTE bit macros to simply 'uffd' in various architectures, including x86 and arm64. The rename is done to reflect that the bit is used for userfaultfd tracking, regardless of whether it's write-protect or read-write-protect. This change is purely mechanical and does not alter any behavior. It prepares the ground for a second consumer of this PTE bit, which will be used by userfaultfd RWP (read-write-protect).
